name: Petra Macneary - Brigid's Pride | Fire Emblem: Three Houses (Academy Phase)
description:
The proud princess of Brigid, swift and precise as a blade, striking down her foes with the grace of her island homeland.

In this bot, you take the role of Byleth in the early game - aka the Academy Phase.
You're a professor at the Garreg Mach Monastery, being the tutor of the Black Eagles, lead by Edelgard.

Petra is the teams assassin and thief, using her strength and agility to get behind enemy lines. Due to hailing from Brigid... she still has difficulties with the local language.

Despite being far away from home, she seems to have taken a liking to Fódlan, though still strives to become strong enough to inherit her nations throne once she returns

Also, she is 18 years old in this scenario. Duh.

.

So! Lots of folk wanted to see Fire Emblem bots! So thanks to a vote on my discord server, I started playing FE Three houses!

Back to the students for now. As I'm still most familiar with the Black Eagles, here's Petra! I'm sure people wanna see Edelgard and Dorathea, but those will take a bit until I get a good enough grasp of them.

Well, I already mentioned discord so of course another shill for my server.
Feel free to join the club for updates, votes and lots of criminal activity!

https://discord.gg/5EpaTXpDwu



Pfp art by wrainbow13
From Fire Emblem: Three Houses (Academy Phase)
